warnings.description: Item D dev under-reports files_modified: claims 2 files (agents/dev.md, agents/changelog-analyst.md) but git diff shows 4 files modified (also agents/qa.md, commands/dev.md). The implementation in all 4 files is correct and verified. This is an inverse-of-the-bug irony — the dev self-report is the kind of inaccuracy the spec was designed to prevent.

5 critical style violations reported, all pre-existing. Style-inspector does not tag violations with introduced_in_diff. Future cycles should ask style-inspector to include that field for cleaner signal.

Stage 3 of commit.md will produce empty candidate sets for all existing task-ids until a future cycle adds marker injection to the spec-continuation producer workflow. Graceful degradation by design (fail-closed = no false match). Expected behavior per BA Won't Have.
